lastReleaseMessage: library: grid-auto-rows:150px so tiles can't collapse short; tile fills cell at 100%/100%; container 480px tall for three rows; images stop overflowing into the next row

barRaise.topFinding: Nothing moved since the 2026-06-03 report. No commit has landed since v0.15.12 on 2026-06-01, the three standing HIGH findings are byte-for-byte unchanged, and the remediation backlog aged another day without a single item closing. write-dashboard-status.ps1 still hardcodes barRaise to null, audit.findings to 0/0/0, and workQueueDepth to 0; the 47 em-dashes still ship across the six public files; and direct inspection of .work-queue.json now shows 18 pending YaA items (the 06-03 report tracked ~12), the oldest pending 17 days, none drained. The prior verdict was at-risk and the picture is unchanged 24 hours later, which is the stalled clause. The label engine itself remains healthy; the stall is entirely in the docs / dashboard / work-queue perimeter.
